center.name: 亞馬遜盆地
center.summary: 亞馬遜盆地是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联130种鸟类，包括灰穴䳍、小嘴穴䳍、绿翅雁等130种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Alta Floresta antpitta is found in the Amazon Basin of south-central Brazil, south of the Amazon between the Madeira and Xingu rivers

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Amazonian elaenia is found in the Amazon Basin in eastern Colombia, Ecuador, and Peru, in northern Bolivia, in southern Venezuela, Guyana, and French Guiana, and in roughly the northwestern half of Brazil. An unconfirmed sight record in Suriname lead the SACC to class it as hypothetical in that country. The species inhabits terra firme and várzea tropical evergreen forest, both primary and secondary of all ages

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in much of the Amazon Basin, in Bolivia, Brazil, Colombia, French Guiana, Guyana, Peru, Suriname, and Venezuela.{{cite web |url=https://www.worldbirdnames.org/bow/cardinals/ |title=Cardinals, grosbeaks and "tanager" allies |website= IOC World Bird List |version= v 13.2) |last1=Gill |first1= F

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It probably also occurs in much of the rest of the Brazilian Amazon Basin

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The ash-throated gnateater is found in the upper Amazon Basin in eastern Ecuador, eastern Peru, far western Brazil, and slightly into Bolivia's La Paz Department

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The bamboo antshrike is found in the western Amazon Basin of southeastern Peru, western Brazil, and northwestern Bolivia

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: stresemanni is found in the northwestern Amazon Basin of Brazil between the Rio Negro and the upper Amazon River (Rio Solimões) and west slightly into far eastern Ecuador

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in Brazil, Paraguay, and eastern Bolivia, and extreme northeast Argentina, in the cerrado, pantanal, and the southeastern region of the Amazon basin

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The bay hornero is found in the western Amazon Basin along the rios Huallaga, Ucayali, and Napo in Peru, and through extreme southern Colombia and western Brazil along the upper Amazon (rio Solimões). A sight record in Ecuador leads the South American Classification Committee of the American Ornithological Society to call it hypothetical in that country. The bay hornero primarily inhabits middle-aged river islands that undergo annual flooding, typically in stands of Cecropia

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The black-and-white antbird is found in the western Amazon Basin along the Amazon from its origin in Peru to the mouth of the Rio Madeira in Brazil, and also along its major tributaries

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The black-banded crake is found in the western Amazon Basin, from southeastern Colombia south through eastern Ecuador to south-central Peru and east into western Brazil

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in the western Amazon Basin (Ecuador, Peru and northwestern Bolivia)

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The black-capped parakeet (Pyrrhura rupicola), also known as the black-capped conure or rock conure in aviculture, is a parrot native to the south-western Amazon Basin and adjacent east Andean slopes in Peru, Bolivia and Brazil. It has a total length of approximately 25 cm. It is mostly green with off white scalloping on the hindneck and breast and red primary coverts. It lives in humid forests, ranging from the Amazonian lowlands up to an altitude of 1000 m on the east Andean slopes

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The black caracara (Daptrius ater) is a bird of prey in the family Falconidae that is found in Amazonian and French Guianan lowlands, mainly occurring along rivers

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The black-tailed antbird is found in the far western Amazon Basin of Peru, Brazil, and Colombia

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: barbatulus: breeds in southern Florida, Bahamas, Cuba, and Little Cayman and Cayman Brac in the Cayman Islands; winters in the Amazon Basin *V

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: 57:145-164. It typically winters in tropical montane forests, from roughly , mainly from Colombia to Peru, more sporadically in Panama and the Amazon region.Hilty, S

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in southern Colombia, eastern Venezuela, the Guyanas, northeast Brazil, the Amazon Basin in Brazil, Bolivia, Ecuador and Peru; and in Tobago

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It inhabits humid tropical forest of the Amazon Basin including terra firme, várzea, gallery, and semi-deciduous types

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: minor is found in the western Amazon Basin from southeastern Colombia south through eastern Ecuador and eastern Peru into far northwestern Bolivia and east into western Brazil to the Rio Negro and lower Rio Madeira.{{cite book | last = | first = | title =Check-list of North American Birds | publisher =American Ornithologists' Union |edition =7th | date =1998 | location =Washington, D.C

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in the Amazon Basin of northern Brazil and Amazonian Colombia, Ecuador, Peru and northern-border Bolivia, and also the Guianan countries of Guyana, Suriname, and French Guiana

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: viridipennis is found in eastern Peru, eastern Bolivia, and western Amazonian Brazil

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in the Amazon Basin of northern Brazil, southern Colombia and eastern Peru and Ecuador; also the Guianan countries of Guyana, Suriname and eastern French Guiana

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The chestnut-capped puffbird is found in the upper Amazon Basin of southern Venezuela; eastern Colombia, Ecuador, and Peru; northern Bolivia; and western Brazil

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: castaneus: eastern and southeastern Brazil south of a line roughly from Mato Grosso do Sul northeast to northern Bahia and from there south to northern Rio Grande do Sul and into southeastern Paraguay and far northeastern Argentina's Misiones Province In the Amazon Basin the chestnut-crowned becard inhabits humid terra firme and várzea lowland forest, where it favors the edges and clearings with tall trees

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in the northern and western Amazon Basin from eastern Colombia east across southern Venezuela, and the Guianas to the Atlantic and south through eastern Ecuador, eastern Peru, and western Brazil into northwestern Bolivia

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The nominate subspecies is the most widespread of the three; it is found in the central Amazon Basin in the Brazilian states of Rondônia, Mato Grosso, Pará, and Tocantins

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The chestnut-winged hookbill is found in the Amazon Basin from southeastern Colombia south through eastern Ecuador and eastern Peru into northern Bolivia and east in Brazil to the Rio Tapajós

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: One population is found in far eastern Peru's Department of Madre de Dios, northern and eastern Bolivia, and Brazil's western Amazon Basin

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The collared puffbird is found in most of the Amazon Basin, from southeastern Colombia south through eastern Ecuador and Peru to northern Bolivia and east through southern Venezuela, the Guianas, and northern Brazil

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Besides the northern Amazon Basin and the Guianas including the Guiana Highlands, the contiguous range in the southeastern Amazon Basin extends to Maranhão state Brazil, and covers the downstream third of the three north-flowing river systems: the Tapajós River, Xingu River, and the Araguaia-Tocantins River system; in the Andean west, in central Peru, the range extends southward, upstream 1300 km into the Ucayali River drainage region of central Peru

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The crimson-bellied parakeet is found in the Amazon Basin from the Mamoré River in northeastern Bolivia east into Brazil south of the Amazon River in the states of Mato Grosso, Rondônia, Amazonas, and Pará

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The curl-crested aracari is found in the southwestern Amazon Basin south of the Amazon River

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The dark-winged trumpeter is found in the Amazon Basin of Brazil south of the Amazon River

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The double-collared seedeater is only found in the southern Amazon Basin, limited by the Amazon River as its northern limit

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Duida woodcreeper is found in the northwestern Amazon Basin of southern Venezuela, eastern Ecuador, northeastern Peru, and Brazil north of the Rio Solimões (upper Amazon River) and west of the Rio Negro. Worldwide taxonomic systems also include eastern Colombia in its range, but the South American Classification Committee of the American Ornithological Society lists it as hypothetical there, because all of the reports are undocumented sight records.Clements, J

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: fuscicapillus of the dusky-capped woodcreeper is found in the Amazon Basin of northeastern Bolivia and western Brazil, south of the Amazon River in the interfluve of the Madeira and Tapajós rivers

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Castelnau|journal=Revue et magasin de zoologie pure et appliquée|date=1851|volume=3|issue=5|page=209|url=https://www.biodiversitylibrary.org/page/2321196|series=2nd ser.}} | synonyms=Conurus weddellii | range_map = Aratinga weddellii map.svg }} The dusky-headed parakeet (Aratinga weddellii), also known as Weddell's conure or dusky-headed conure in aviculture, is a small green Neotropical parrot with dusty grey head found in wooded habitats in the western Amazon basin of South America

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: interposita is found in the Amazon Basin south of the Amazon between the Xingu and Tocantins rivers in eastern Pará state

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The nominate subspecies of eastern striolated puffbird is found in the south central Amazon Basin, in Brazil between the Madeira and Tapajós rivers, and into extreme northeastern Bolivia (Santa Cruz Department)

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: | title =Birds of Venezuela | publisher =Princeton University Press | edition =second | date =2003 | location =Princeton NJ | pages =664 | language =English }} It also occurs in northern Roraima in extreme northern Brazil. Though Colombia is not included as part of its range by the IOC, the independent South American Classification Committee has records in that country. The nominate subspecies has an oddly-shaped distribution in the Amazon Basin within which it is found at scattered sites

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The nominate subspecies of fork-tailed palm swift is found in the Amazon Basin from northern Bolivia, eastern Peru, and eastern Ecuador through eastern Colombia and northwestern Brazil into southern and eastern Venezuela

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The fulvous-crested tanager is found in the entire Amazon Basin, but only the downstream third of the southern half, in the southeast and southwest

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in Bolivia, Brazil, Colombia, Ecuador, Peru, and Venezuela, in the Orinoco River Basin and western Amazon Basin

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The greater yellow-headed vulture is found in the Amazon Basin of tropical South America; specifically in south-eastern Colombia, southern and eastern Venezuela, Guyana, French Guiana, Suriname, northern and western Brazil, northern Bolivia, eastern Peru and eastern Ecuador

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in wooded habitats in the Amazon basin and Guianas of South America, and is generally common

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: left|thumb|Male in his lush, tropical habitat As suggested by its name, the Guianan cock-of-the-rock is found in the Guianan Shield, occurring in French Guiana, Suriname, Guyana, southern Venezuela, eastern Colombia, and northern Amazonian Brazil

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The hoary-throated spinetail has a very restricted range in the extreme northern Amazon Basin

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Inambari woodcreeper is found in western Amazon Basin of eastern Peru, northern and central Bolivia, and western Brazil south of the Amazon River as far east as the Madeira River

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The ladder-tailed nightjar is found in all regions of the Amazon basin, and in the northeast the Guiana Shield and the Guianan countries; its range does not extend east of the Amazon River outlet, (the island: Ilha de Marajo)

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The large elaenia is found in the Amazon Basin from southeastern Colombia, eastern Ecuador, eastern Peru, and northern Bolivia across Brazil and from Amazonia south through Mato Grosso do Sul in Brazil and southeastern Bolivia into northwestern Argentina and through most of Paraguay and far northwestern Uruguay into northeastern Argentina as far as southern Buenos Aires Province

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The lined forest falcon is found in the Amazon Basin from eastern Colombia, eastern Ecuador, eastern Peru, and northern Bolivia east through Venezuela, the Guianas, and northern Brazil to the Atlantic coast

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The long-billed woodcreeper is found in the Orinoco River Basin of southern Venezuela and in the Amazon Basin from eastern Colombia, central Ecuador, north-central and eastern Peru, and northern Bolivia through Amazonian Brazil to the Atlantic Ocean in the states of Amapá, Pará, and Maranhão

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Clyde Todd|Todd]], 1925 | synonyms = | range_map = Lophotriccus eulophotes map.svg }} The long-crested pygmy tyrant (Lophotriccus eulophotes) is a species of bird in the family Tyrannidae, the tyrant flycatchers. It is found in the western Amazon Basin of Bolivia, Brazil and Peru.Remsen, J

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Munn III|Munn]] & Franke, 1991 | synonyms = Forpus dachilleae| range_map = Nannopsittaca dachilleae map.svg }} The Manu parrotlet (Nannopsittaca dachilleae) or Amazonian parrotlet is a species of parrotlet native to the western Amazon basin, from southern Peru to northwest Bolivia

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: oleagineus: the eastern half of Colombia, southeastern Venezuela, the Guianas, and the Amazon Basin in Brazil, eastern Ecuador, eastern Peru, and northern Bolivia; separately in coastal southeastern Brazil between Paraíba and Rio do Janeiro states The ochre-bellied flycatcher generally inhabits the interior and edges of humid to wet evergreen forest, semi-deciduous forest, and nearby secondary forest in the tropical and subtropical zones

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: In most of the Amazon Basin it occurs in transitional forest, seasonally flooded várzea forest, and swamp forest between sea level and about

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: In the Amazon Basin it inhabits both várzea and terra firme forest. Overall it ranges in elevation mostly from sea level to .{{cite book | last = | first = | title =Check-list of North American Birds | publisher =American Ornithologists' Union |edition =7th | date =1998 | location =Washington, D.C

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in the Amazonian Andes, in humid lowland forests in the northwestern, southwestern, and south-central Amazon Basin in South America

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The pale-winged trumpeter is found in the upper Amazon Basin of eastern Peru, northern and central Bolivia, and central-western Brazil south of the Amazon and west of the Rio Madeira

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The pectoral sparrow is non-migratory and can be found everywhere in the Amazon Basin east of the Andes except for the western parts between the Negro and Purus rivers. Besides the Amazon jungle, it is found in eastern and north-eastern Brazil. It occupies altitudes up to in southern Venezuela, in southeastern Peru, and in Bolivia

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Peruvian recurvebill is found in the western Amazon Basin of southeastern Peru, northern Bolivia, and far western Brazil, and also locally in isolated areas further east in Amazonian Brazil

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: In the Amazon Basin it mostly inhabits terra firme and floodplain forests, and less frequently occurs in várzea and swamp forests

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The plumbeous antbird is found in the western Amazon Basin

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: According to some sources it skirts a wide band of northern Amazonia. However, van Perlo's field guide shows the species occupying the entirety of the Amazon Basin. The purple-throated fruitcrow inhabits lowland evergreen forest in the tropical zone, where it prefers the forest's midstory to canopy.{{cite book | last = | first = | title =Check-list of North American Birds | publisher =American Ornithologists' Union |edition =7th | date =1998 | location =Washington, D.C

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The purplish jacamar is found in the western Amazon Basin from southeast Colombia's Putumayo and Amazonas Departments south through eastern Ecuador into eastern Peru and east into Brazil as far as the Juruá River in Amazonas state

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Purus jacamar is found in the upper Amazon Basin of eastern Peru, western Brazil, and northern Bolivia

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The red-billed pied tanager is found in the upper Amazon Basin from eastern and southeastern Peru and northern Bolivia east to central Brazil and north into the Guianas

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The red-billed woodcreeper is found in the northeastern Amazon Basin from eastern Venezuela east through the Guianas and northern Brazil north of the Amazon River between the Rio Negro and Amapá state

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It occurs in lowlands of the Guianas, Venezuela, eastern Colombia, eastern Ecuador, eastern Peru, northern and eastern Bolivia and the Amazon basin in Brazil

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: olallae, Brazil south of the Amazon between the Madeira River and the Atlantic coast in Maranhão, and south to Mato Grosso and central Bolivia The red-necked woodpecker is a bird of the Amazon Basin, where it inhabits rain-, terra firme, and várzea forests

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The red-winged wood rail is found in the western Amazon basin, in eastern Ecuador, north- and central eastern Peru, and the western part of the Brazilian state of Amazonas

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The ringed antpipit is primarily a bird of the Amazon Basin and also occurs in the Orinoco Basin

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: amazonica of the Rio Madeira stipplethroat is found in south-central Amazonian Brazil from the watershed of the Juruá River east to the Madeira River, in Peru's Department of Madre de Dios, and in far northern Bolivia's Pando Department.Clements, J

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The river tyrannulet is found in the Amazon Basin along four major river wildlife corridors; also two rivers in Venezuela, including the lower Orinoco

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The rufous-faced antbird is found in the central Amazon Basin south of the Amazon between the Madeira and Tocantins rivers and south into northern Rondônia and far northern Mato Grosso states

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The nominate subspecies of rufous motmot occurs in the western Amazon Basin in southeastern Colombia through eastern Ecuador and Peru to northern Bolivia, and east into western Brazil

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in the Guianas, southern Venezuela and the northwestern Amazon Basin

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in the eastern and central sections of the Amazon basin south of the Amazon River, only just extending onto the northern bank of this river

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The scarlet-crowned barbet is found in the central Amazon Basin

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The scarlet-hooded barbet is found in the upper Amazon Basin where eastern Peru, western Brazil, and a bit of western Bolivia meet

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in northeastern Venezuela and adjacent Guyana, from southern Venezuela through southeastern Colombia, eastern Ecuador, and eastern Peru into northern Bolivia, and in the eastern Amazon Basin of Brazil

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Sclater's antwren is found in the upper Amazon Basin south of the Amazon River, in eastern Peru, northern Bolivia, and western Brazil east to the Xingu River and south to Mato Grosso state

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in the Amazon Basin from southern Colombia south through eastern Ecuador and eastern Peru into northern Bolivia and east through southern and eastern Venezuela, the Guianas, and Brazil north of the approximate line southern Mato Grosso – southern Goiás – southern Minas Gerais – central Espírito Santo

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It breeds in south-eastern Brazil and adjacent parts of Argentina, Paraguay and Bolivia, but is believed to spend the Austral winter further north in the Amazon basin, northern South America and Panama

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The slate-colored antbird is found in the lowlands of the western Amazon Basin

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in southern parts of Central America, the southwestern Amazon Basin, Colombia, Venezuela, Trinidad and Tobago and the Guianas

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: A separate, much larger, range is found in the Amazon Basin from eastern Colombia, eastern Ecuador, eastern Peru, and northern Bolivia east through Venezuela, the Guianas, and northern Brazil to the Atlantic coast

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The sooty antbird inhabits the western Amazon Basin, where the nominate subspecies is by far the more widely distributed of the two

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The speckled spinetail is found in much of the Amazon Basin

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Spix's woodcreeper is found in the lower Amazon Basin of northeastern Brazil

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: guttatus, the Amazon Basin of eastern Ecuador, eastern Peru, northeastern Bolivia, and western to northeastern Brazil The spot-breasted woodpecker inhabits a wide variety of humid lowland landscapes both open and wooded, though it prefers sparse woodlands to dense ones

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The striated antbird has one large continuous range in the Amazon Basin's southwest as well as the south-central area in the countries of southeastern Peru, northwestern Bolivia and Brazil

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The sulphur-bellied tyrant-manakin is a bird of the far western Amazon Basin. One population separate from its main range is found in Peru's Loreto and San Martín departments

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Tapajos antpitta is found in the Amazon Basin of central Brazil, south of the Amazon and east of the Madeira River

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The nominate subspecies of the tui parakeet is found in the Amazon Basin of extreme southeastern Colombia, eastern Peru, northern Bolivia, and Brazil east to the Rio Madeira

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The nominate subspecies of the uniform woodcreeper is found in the Amazon Basin south of the Amazon River in Brazil between the Madeira and Xingu rivers and south to Mato Grosso state and northeastern Bolivia's Santa Cruz Department

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in most western regions of the Amazon Basin and Amazonian Bolivia, Brazil, Colombia, Ecuador, Peru; also regions of Venezuela

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The bird's range in northern Brazil is the lower portion of the Amazon Basin and the adjacent Tocantins River drainage, with its northwestern limits from Brazil and the Guyanas, the eastern banks of the Orinoco River drainage in central Venezuela

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The western striolated puffbird is found in the western Amazon Basin, from southern Colombia south through central Ecuador and central and eastern Peru into central Bolivia and east into Brazil south of the Amazon River to the Madeira River

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in the Amazon basin in the northern half of Brazil, northeastern Peru, eastern Ecuador, eastern Colombia, southern Venezuela, Guyana, Suriname and French Guiana

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The white-eared jacamar is found in the upper Amazon basin from Meta Department in central Colombia south through eastern Ecuador to the Ucayali River in northeastern Peru

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: In the Amazon Basin it is found in várzea and other swampy forest, typically on river banks and islands

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The white hawk's range in central South America is the entire Amazon basin, from the Andes on the west to the Guianas on the Atlantic on the northeast, and to the transition lands to the south

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The white-tailed cotinga is found in the lower Amazon Basin of Brazil south of the Amazon River

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The white-throated jacamar is found in a small area of the upper Amazon Basin where eastern Peru, western Brazil, and northern Bolivia abut

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It inhabits humid tropical forest of the Amazon Basin including terra firme, várzea, and gallery types, and also cerrado woodland

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: There are also scattered records in Brazil to the east of its contiguous range. The white-vented euphonia inhabits a variety of humid to wet lowland forest landscapes in the tropical and lower subtropical zones. In Central America these include the canopy and edges of rainforest. In the Amazon Basin the landscapes include várzea and terra firme forests and nearby clearings in drier forest. In elevation it reaches in northern Central America, in Costa Rica, in Colombia, in Ecuador, in Peru, in Venezuela, and in Brazil.{{cite book | last =Schulenberg | first =T.S

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in Amazonian regions of Colombia, Ecuador, Peru, Bolivia and Brazil; also the eastern Orinoco River region of Venezuela

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in the Amazon Basin's western half

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The yellow-billed nunbird is found in two areas of the upper Amazon Basin

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: First described by Johann Baptist von Spix in 1825, this American sparrow is found across much of the Amazon basin in South America

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The yellow-chinned spinetail is found in all contiguous regions of Brazil, except specific parts of the Amazon Basin

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in the western Amazon Basin (Peru, Acre and northwestern Bolivia)

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The yellow-crowned amazon is found in the Amazon basin and Guianas, with additional populations in northwestern South America and Panama

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is migratory breeding from Mexico to Panama and wintering in the northern and eastern Andes and the western Amazon Basin

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Amazonian umbrellabird (Cephalopterus ornatus) is a species of bird in the family Cotingidae native to the Amazon basin with a separate population on the eastern slopes of the Andes

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Found in humid tropical and subtropical forests in the western and northern Amazon Basin in South America, the species can be found in Venezuela, Peru, Colombia, Ecuador, Bolivia and Brazil

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in the Amazon Basin except in the north-west basin region with western Guyana, Venezuela, and central-eastern Colombia

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The small-billed tinamou (Crypturellus parvirostris) is a type of tinamou commonly found in dry savanna in Amazonian South America

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is native to southern Colombia, southern Venezuela, Suriname, Guyana, French Guiana, northern and western Brazil, eastern Ecuador, eastern Peru, and northern Bolivia. Within Brazil, it occupies the Amazon Basin south to Mato Grosso and east to Pará. It lives in a lowland rainforest or swamp forest, up to altitude. It also occupies second growth forest, along with bushy areas with scattered trees

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in the lowland forests of northeastern South America (the Guiana Shield), in the northeast Amazon Basin, the Guianas and the eastern Orinoco River drainage of Venezuela

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in central-southern South America: in southwestern Brazil, Bolivia, Paraguay, Uruguay, and northeastern Argentina, including southern regions of the Amazon Basin river systems bordering the Pantanal

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Though the IUCN range map includes French Guiana, Suriname, and Paraguay, the South American Classification Committee of the American Ornithological Society has no records in the first two countries and records only as a vagrant in Paraguay. The Orinoco goose inhabits wet savanna and the edges of large freshwater wetlands in the wet season and in the dry season, it is also found on river beaches and oxbow lakes in the Amazon Basin

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: In the Amazon Basin it is most often found in the canopy of várzea and the edges of lakes and rivers

links.evidence: It is found in central-southern South America: in southwestern Brazil, Bolivia, Paraguay, Uruguay, and northeastern Argentina, including southern regions of the Amazon Basin river systems bordering the Pantanal

links.evidence: Though the IUCN range map includes French Guiana, Suriname, and Paraguay, the South American Classification Committee of the American Ornithological Society has no records in the first two countries and records only as a vagrant in Paraguay. The Orinoco goose inhabits wet savanna and the edges of large freshwater wetlands in the wet season and in the dry season, it is also found on river beaches and oxbow lakes in the Amazon Basin

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: In the Amazon Basin it is most often found in the canopy of várzea and the edges of lakes and rivers

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It occurs in northern Bolivia, eastern Paraguay, far north-eastern Argentina, and eastern, southern and central Brazil, being absent from the arid Caatinga and most of the Amazon Basin, although locally extending into this region in the south-east and along major rivers (e.g

links.evidence: |year=2018 |title=Guaruba guarouba |volume=2018 |article-number=e.T22724703A132029835 |doi=10.2305/IUCN.UK.2018-2.RLTS.T22724703A132029835.en |access-date=18 February 2025}} | status2 = CITES_A1 | status2_system = CITES | status2_ref = |display_parents= 2 | genus = Guaruba | parent_authority = Lesson, 1830 | species = guarouba | authority = (Gmelin, JF, 1788) | synonyms=Psittacus guaroubaAratinga guarouba | range_map = Guaruba guarouba Map.svg }} The golden parakeet, golden conure, or Queen of Bavaria conure (Guaruba guarouba) is a medium-sized golden-yellow Neotropical parrot native to the Amazon Basin of interior northern Brazil

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The hoatzin ( ) or hoactzin ( ) (Opisthocomus hoazin) is a species of tropical bird found in swamps, riparian forests, and mangroves of the Amazon and Orinoco Basins in South America
